app_test_boundary_rules.rationale: App tests must not re-test core inference classification semantics.
App tests must not re-test core confidence calibration semantics.
App tests must not re-test core freshness classification semantics.

app_source_boundary_rules.rationale: App source must not run core inference classification.
App source must not classify authority from confidence/freshness.
App source must not create provenance metadata.
Authority ceiling decisions must stay in ZoneTruthCore.
Missing evidence inference must stay in ZoneTruthCore.
